Log:
  devel/py-diazo: update to 1.0.5

--- head/devel/py-diazo/Makefile	Tue May 20 06:54:20 2014	(r354601)
+++ head/devel/py-diazo/Makefile	Tue May 20 06:58:16 2014	(r354602)
@@ -1,8 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	diazo
-PORTVERSION=	1.0.4
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	1.0.5
 CATEGORIES=	devel python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
@@ -17,7 +16,7 @@ RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}lxml
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}repoze.xmliter>=0.3:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-repoze.xmliter \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}webob>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-webob
 
-USES=		zip
+USES=			zip
 USE_PYTHON=		yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
 PYDISTUTILS_AUTOPLIST=	yes
